scenarios.description: parseInput(String,String) with custom stub TreeBuilder returns stub Document (branch-custom-builder-return)
scenarios.precondition: Parser constructed with stub TreeBuilder whose parse(StringReader, baseUri, parser) returns dummy Document
scenarios.expectedResult: same dummy Document instance is returned
pseudocode: TEST TC09 parseInput(String) stub builder return
override parse(Reader in, String uri, Parser p) { return dummy; }

scenarios.description: parseInput(String,String) with stub TreeBuilder.parse throwing RuntimeException propagates same exception (exception-branch)
scenarios.precondition: Parser constructed with stub TreeBuilder whose parse(...) throws IllegalStateException
scenarios.expectedResult: IllegalStateException is propagated with original message
pseudocode: TEST TC10 parseInput(String) stub builder exception
override parse(Reader in, String uri, Parser p) { throw new IllegalStateException("fail-str"); }

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader,String) with stub TreeBuilder.parse throwing RuntimeException propagates same exception (exception-branch)
scenarios.precondition: Parser constructed with stub TreeBuilder whose parse(...) throws IllegalStateException
scenarios.expectedResult: IllegalStateException is propagated with original message
pseudocode: TEST TC11 parseInput(Reader) stub builder exception
override parse(Reader in, String uri, Parser p) { throw new IllegalStateException("fail-rdr"); }
